_comment: Declares the engine_version each tracked output is expected to be running today. Consumers compare provenance.engine_version against the value here and render amber/red on mismatch. Update this file in the same commit as any engine cutover.

pipeline/data/today_regime.json.notes: ETF v3 curated cutover landed 2026-04-27. Weights frozen at c93488b for H-2026-04-27 holdout window — AnkaETFReoptimize is intentionally disabled. Canonical path is pipeline/data/, not data/.

pipeline/data/correlation_breaks.json.notes: 15-min cadence intraday. Sectoral-index peer anchor wired 2026-04-25.

pipeline/data/correlation_break_history..notes: Append-only history of every break the engine has emitted.

pipeline/data/research/phase_c/live_pape.notes: Forward shadow ledger. Open at 09:25, close at 14:30. Gating will tighten when H-2026-04-27-003 lands and POSSIBLE_OPPORTUNITY routing is approved.

pipeline/data/research/track_record/reco.notes: Derived EOD aggregation, NOT canonical. Regenerable from live_paper_ledger.json + replay sources. Public-facing track record.
